data.title: Create golden-path integration test (5 scenarios x 6 consumers)
data.description:
Create tests/hooks/test-merge-state-golden-path.sh exercising all consumer scripts under 5 scenarios:
1. Normal commit (no MERGE_HEAD, no REBASE_HEAD) — no filtering applied
2. MERGE_HEAD present — incoming-only files filtered out
3. REBASE_HEAD + rebase-merge/ — onto-branch-only files filtered out (orig-head-anchored)
4. REBASE_HEAD + rebase-apply/ — same via rebase-apply path
5. MERGE_HEAD == HEAD guard — self-referencing MERGE_HEAD, no filtering applied

6 consumers: review-gate, test-gate, record-test-status, compute-diff-hash, capture-review-diff, classifier. 5 x 6 = 30 minimum test combinations.

Test fixture: Each test creates temp git repo with two branches (main, feature), at least one commit on each, staged files include both worktree-only and incoming-only files. MERGE_HEAD/REBASE_HEAD written into temp .git/.

Coverage mapping: Before Task 12, produce mapping of each test to be deleted → corresponding golden-path or library test.

.test-index update: add golden-path to merge-state.sh entry.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] bash tests/run-all.sh passes
  Verify: bash tests/run-all.sh
- [ ] test file exists
  Verify: test -f tests/hooks/test-merge-state-golden-path.sh
- [ ] Test covers at least 30 combinations
  Verify: grep -c "^test_" tests/hooks/test-merge-state-golden-path.sh | awk '{exit ($1 < 30)}'
- [ ] All golden-path tests pass
  Verify: bash tests/hooks/test-merge-state-golden-path.sh
- [ ] .test-index updated
  Verify: grep -q "test-merge-state-golden-path" .test-index
